subcodes.first_line: O noble scion of that glorious servant, child of a father pure-born! Each day did he manifest new signs and tokens in the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نجل جمیل آن عبد جلیل پدر پاک گهر هر روزی در امرالله ظهوری و بروزی نمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
